subject: Design proposal: LCARS dashboard — human factors + semantic coloring + FiraCode + semiotic analysis

body.summary: T18-grounded analysis of the interagent dashboard LCARS mode. Covers semantic coloring (5 color fixes including protanopia accessibility), FiraCode typography (explicit loading + ligatures + weight hierarchy), human factors (Nielsen heuristics, WCAG contrast, cognitive load), and Peircean semiotic analysis (sign system audit, interpretant communities, triple-encoding differentiation).
key_proposals: Load FiraCode from Google Fonts with ligatures enabled (XS effort)
Fix health color from blue-violet to green (universal convention, XS)
Separate psychology-agent identity color from transport (XS)
Fix text-dim WCAG AA contrast failure (XS)
Two-layer LCARS typography: Antonio for structure, FiraCode for data (S)
Shift tab names from symbolic to iconic: Pulse→Health, Meta→Messages (XS)
Add SETL color gradient for indexical grounding (S)
Add message-type icons for pre-attentive scanning (S)
body.grounding: T18 (UX Design), Peircean semiotics (T4 Check 9), Nielsen 10 heuristics, WCAG 2.1, cogarch structural invariants

claims.claim: WCAG contrast ratios computed against LCARS theme backgrounds
Protanopia discrimination issues verified through hex analysis
claims.basis: Color distance in protanopia simulation space

epistemic_flags: Color semantic fit assessments carry subjective aesthetic judgment alongside empirical accessibility standards
